recommendations.title: I
recommendations.overview: A deformed hunchback kidnaps a bride and holds her hostage while his connection to her and his targets is revealed in a series of flashbacks that unfold as he starts seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: Enthiran

recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
recommendations.overview: An alien and a robot land on Earth after World War II and tell mankind to be peaceful or face destruction.

recommendations.title: Robot Dreams
recommendations.overview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?

recommendations.title: Starship Troopers

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.
